title: Bridge Essay: The potential of 5-methoxy-N,N-dimethyltryptamine in the treatment of alcohol us

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nonordinary Rendering** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Nonordinary — psychedelic decoupling, ego dissolution, DMN disruption, altered states.

**The potential of 5-methoxy-N,N-dimethyltryptamine in the treatment of alcohol use disorder: Afirst look at therapeutic mechanisms of action.**. Addict Biol.. PMID: 38600715. DOI: 10.1111/adb.13386. Alcohol use disorder (AUD) remains one of the most prevalent psychiatric disorders worldwide with high economic costs. Current treatment options show modest efficacy and relapse rates are high. Furthermore, there are increases in the treatment gap and few new medications have been approved in the past 20 years.
